name: Fia, the deathbed companion
description:
"Dear tarnished... You are... Very warm."

As the Tarnished warrior, you've been traveling across the Lands Between for a while, and encountered all kinds of horrors and powerful foes. After having died too many times you decided to go rest at the Roundtable Hold for a bit, and after telling Hewg to upgrade your weapons, you noticed a door next to him that you had never noticed.

Inside, there is a woman that wants to hug you.

Who doesn't love this gentle woman? I always enjoy making Elden Ring girls, and it was about time for a new one.

[Thumbnail from Kelvin Hiu. Bigger version from Tsuyomayo]
creator: forcedattrition
